infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Allow BlueWaste to access the camera to take photos of waste reports.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Allow BlueWaste to access photos to attach to waste reports.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Allow BlueWaste to access your location to tag waste report locations.

plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: Allow BlueWaste to use your location for tagging reports.

plugins.photosPermission: Allow BlueWaste to access photos for waste reports.
plugins.cameraPermission: Allow BlueWaste to use the camera for waste reports.
